_note: Editorial — hand-curated from https://northwoodsleague.com/wausau-woodchucks/2026-promotional-schedule/. Each event: {date: 'YYYY-MM-DD', month: 'May', day: '28', title: '...', desc: '...', tags: ['promo'|'theme'|'community'|'fireworks'|'family'|...]}. Refresh annually when the team publishes next season's promo page.

events.title: Opening Day vs Green Bay Rockers
events.desc: First game of the 2026 Chucks season! First 500 fans 18+ receive a free hat courtesy of the Wisconsin Lottery. Thirsty Thursday: $4 domestic 16 oz draft beer. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Classic Rock Firework Friday vs Wisconsin Rapids Rafters
events.desc: First Firework Friday of the year. First 200 fans receive a light baton. Pre-game performance by the Wausau Academy of Dance. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Woody's Reading Club Day vs Wisconsin Rapids Rafters
events.desc: Reading Club participants redeem free tickets. Festival Foods Family Ticket Night: $12 ticket with brat and tap soda. First pitch at 5:05 PM.

events.title: Bang for Your Buck Night vs Lakeshore Chinooks
events.desc: $2 hot dogs, $2 tap sodas, $4 16oz domestic drafts. First pitch at 6:05 PM.

events.title: Cowboys & Space Rangers Night vs Lakeshore Chinooks
events.desc: Special character Meet & Greet in the Pepsi Tailgate Pavilion ($15 ticket includes access). Theme t-shirts for sale. White Claw Wednesday specials throughout the park. First pitch at 6:05 PM.

events.title: Thirsty Thursday vs Madison Mallards
events.desc: $4 domestic 16 oz drafts all night. First pitch at 6:05 PM.

events.title: Hot Dog Hundo Night vs Wisconsin Rapids Rafters
events.desc: Select hot dogs at the concession stands will be wrapped with money vouchers from $1–$100. Festival Foods Family Ticket Night: $12 ticket with brat and tap soda. First pitch at 5:05 PM.

events.title: Reading Club + Kids Run the Bases vs Wisconsin Rapids Rafters
events.desc: Reading Club Redemption Day #2. Post-game: kids 12 and under run the bases, presented by Culver's. First pitch at 1:05 PM.

events.title: Bang for Your Buck Night vs Thunder Bay Border Cats
events.desc: $2 hot dogs, $2 tap sodas, $4 16oz domestic drafts. Border Cats visit Athletic Park. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Ice Cream Jersey Giveaway vs Thunder Bay Border Cats
events.desc: First 500 kids under 18 receive a free Woodchucks Ice Cream Jersey, presented by Festival Foods. DC Everest Youth Baseball Fundraiser Night. White Claw Wednesday specials throughout the park. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Boy Band Firework Friday vs Fond du Lac Dock Spiders
events.desc: Fireworks presented by Cellcom. First 200 fans receive a light baton. Mosinee Youth Baseball Fundraiser Night. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Miller Lite Cribbage Board Giveaway vs Fond du Lac Dock Spiders
events.desc: Fans receive a Woodchucks Cribbage Board (while supplies last), presented by Miller Lite. Festival Foods Family Ticket Night: $12 ticket with brat and tap soda. First pitch at 5:05 PM.

events.title: ZOOperstars! vs Fond du Lac Dock Spiders
events.desc: Special ZOOperstars! appearance, presented by Rib Mountain Paper. Bang for Your Buck Night: $2 hot dogs, $2 tap sodas, $4 16oz domestic drafts. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Aspirus Jersey Auction vs Green Bay Rockers
events.desc: Game-worn beach-themed jerseys auctioned off in support of Safe Kids Marathon County. Thirsty Thursday: $4 domestic 16 oz drafts. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Country Roads Firework Friday vs Fond du Lac Dock Spiders
events.desc: Country-themed post-game fireworks show, presented by American Family Insurance. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Thirsty Thursday + Wausau East Band Fundraiser vs Kenosha Kingfish
events.desc: $4 domestic 16 oz drafts all night. Wausau East Band Fundraiser Night. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Light Up the Night Fireworks vs Kenosha Kingfish
events.desc: Post-game fireworks show. First 200 fans receive a light baton. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Independence Day 250th Firework Celebration vs Madison Mallards
events.desc: Special Independence Day fireworks, presented by Medical College of Wisconsin – Central Wisconsin. First 200 fans receive a light baton. Festival Foods Family Ticket Night: $12 ticket with brat and tap soda. First pitch at 6:05 PM.

events.title: Reading Club Day #3 vs Fond du Lac Dock Spiders
events.desc: Reading Club Redemption Day #3. Festival Foods Family Ticket Night: $12 ticket with brat and tap soda. First pitch at 5:05 PM.

events.title: Unlimited Hot Dogs Night vs Green Bay Rockers
events.desc: All-game unlimited hot dogs! Up to 5 per trip to the concession stand, unlimited returns throughout the game. First pitch at 6:05 PM.

events.title: Bang for Your Buck Night vs Madison Mallards
events.desc: $2 hot dogs, $2 tap sodas, $4 16oz domestic drafts. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: World Cup Night vs Madison Mallards
events.desc: Celebrate the start of the World Cup. First 500 fans through the gates receive a Woodchucks mini soccer ball. MC United Fundraiser Night. White Claw Wednesday specials. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Ag Appreciation + Petting Zoo vs Duluth Huskies
events.desc: Ag Appreciation Night with a petting zoo. Brickner Family Auto Group Night. Pregame performance by Expressions Dance. Bang for Your Buck Night: $2 hot dogs, $2 tap sodas, $4 domestic drafts. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: White Claw Wednesday vs Duluth Huskies
events.desc: White Claw specials throughout the park. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Doubleheader vs Green Bay Rockers — Lunch with the Chucks + Bobblehead
events.desc: Game 1 (12:05 PM): Lunch With the Chucks. Game 2 (6:35 PM): Aspirus Diving Woody Bobblehead Giveaway — first 500 fans receive a Diving Catch Woody bobblehead, courtesy of Aspirus. Merrill Baseball Association Fundraiser Night. Thirsty Thursday: $4 domestic 16 oz drafts.

events.title: Raised on Country Firework Show vs Eau Claire Express
events.desc: Post-game country-themed fireworks, presented by Wisconsin Chevy Dealers. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Camo Hat Giveaway vs Eau Claire Express
events.desc: First 500 fans through the gate receive a Woodchucks Camo Hat. Prentice Youth Baseball and Softball Fundraiser Night. Festival Foods Family Ticket Night: $12 ticket with brat and tap soda. First pitch at 5:05 PM.

events.title: Faith and Family Night vs Wisconsin Rapids Rafters
events.desc: $8 bleacher seats or $25 Leinie's Party Area tickets (non-alcohol), presented by Denyon Homes. Post-game: kids 12 and under run the bases, presented by Culver's. First pitch at 1:05 PM.

events.title: Be Amazing Youth T-Shirt Giveaway vs Fond du Lac Dock Spiders
events.desc: First 500 youth fans receive a free Woodchucks T-Shirt, courtesy of Thrivent Financial. Be Amazing Night Fundraiser: $16.50 reserved box seat in Section 205 includes hot dog and soda or water. White Claw Wednesday specials. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Thorogood Woody Bobblehead Giveaway vs Wisconsin Rapids Rafters
events.desc: First 500 fans receive a Thorogood Woody Bobblehead, courtesy of Thorogood. Wausau West Band Fundraiser. Thirsty Thursday: $4 domestic 16 oz drafts. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Lunch Cooler Bag Giveaway vs Lakeshore Chinooks
events.desc: First 500 fans receive a Woodchucks Lunch Cooler Bag, courtesy of Crystal Finishing Systems. Festival Foods Family Ticket Night: $12 tickets include a brat and tap soda. First pitch at 5:05 PM.

events.title: Team Poster Giveaway vs Lakeshore Chinooks
events.desc: Team poster giveaway (while supplies last). Post-game: kids 12 and under run the bases, presented by Culver's. First pitch at 1:05 PM.

events.title: Bang for Your Buck + Athens Fundraiser vs Green Bay Rockers
events.desc: Bang for Your Buck Night: $2 hot dogs, $2 tap sodas, $4 16oz domestic drafts. Athens Youth Baseball Fundraiser Night. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Summer Hits Fireworks + Strike Out Hunger vs Minnesota Mud Puppies
events.desc: Last firework show of the year! Summer-themed post-game fireworks, presented by Sanford Health Marshfield Clinic. Strike Out Hunger community food drive. DC Everest Band Fundraiser Night. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Firefighter Appreciation + Season Home Finale vs Lakeshore Chinooks
events.desc: Last home game of the regular season. Come support those who serve our community. First pitch at 1:05 PM.
